description: Portrait-orientation quote card. The upper two-thirds is a color photograph of Donald Trump mid-speech, leaning toward a microphone with his right hand raised, wearing a dark navy suit, white shirt, and red tie with a small American-flag lapel pin. Behind him is a blurred White House interior with holiday decorations: green garland with warm bokeh string-lights, a framed painting on a wood-paneled wall to the left, and a dark blue flag to the right. The lower third is a dark navy semi-transparent overlay carrying white body text, with a faint large quotation-mark glyph and a ghosted circular seal watermark behind the text. The text reads: 'For a very long time, buying and owning a home was considered the pinnacle of the American Dream. It was the reward for working hard, and doing the right thing, but now, because of the Record High Inflation caused by Joe Biden and the Democrats in Congress, that American Dream is increasingly out of reach for far too many people, especially younger Americans.' followed by a bolded passage: 'It is for that reason, and much more, that I am immediately taking steps to ban large institutional investors from buying more single-family homes, and I will be calling on Congress to codify it. People live in homes, not corporations.' Attribution at bottom-left in bold: 'President Donald J. Trump' and in italics 'Truth Social, January 7th, 2026'.
notable_text: People live in homes, not corporations. | I am immediately taking steps to ban large institutional investors from buying more single-family homes
